# Intimate.Wine Blog

> Stories, updates, and editorial content from Intimate Wine.

## Scope
- This file describes `blog.intimate.wine`, not the main `intimate.wine` site.

## Canonical Site
- https://www.blog.intimate.wine

## Related Site
- https://intimate.wine

## Summary
- Intimate Wine offers private wine tastings and wine classes in intimate settings with incredible wine and stories you will remember.
- The blog is the editorial home for those stories, updates, and related wine content.

## Topics
- private wine tastings
- wine classes
- wine experiences
- sommelier-led tastings
- wine storytelling

## Credibility
- Founder: Emily Spadafora
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/emilyspadafora
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/intimate.wine/

## Key Pages
- https://www.blog.intimate.wine/

## URL Structure
- The homepage `/` is the blog index.
- Articles are published at root-level URLs on the blog domain.
- The sitemap is the primary crawl source for article discovery.

## Crawl Endpoints
- robots: https://www.blog.intimate.wine/robots.txt
- sitemap: https://www.blog.intimate.wine/sitemap.xml
- pages sitemap: https://www.blog.intimate.wine/pages-sitemap.xml
- feed: https://www.blog.intimate.wine/feed.xml
- site-facts: https://www.blog.intimate.wine/site-facts.json
